timestream.scheduledquery.mixedmeasurema: MixedMeasureMappings are mappings that can be used to ingest data into a mixture of narrow and multi measures in the derived table.

timestream.scheduledquery.mixedmeasurema.Description: Refers to the value of measure_name in a result row. This field is required if MeasureNameColumn is provided.
Type of the value that is to be read from sourceColumn. If the mapping is for MULTI, use MeasureValueType.MULTI.
Required when measureValueType is MULTI. Attribute mappings for MULTI value measures.
This field refers to the source column from which measure-value is to be read for result materialization.
Target measure name to be used. If not provided, the target measure name by default would be measure-name if provided, or sourceColumn otherwise.
